about.privacy.body: RESERVIVES respects your privacy and protects your personal data according to GDPR. Data collected includes your institutional email, booking history, and notification preferences. Data is used only to manage bookings and services within the school. Data is retained while your school account remains active. You may exercise your access, rectification, erasure, and portability rights by contacting the school.

about.terms.body: By using RESERVIVES, you agree to the following terms: use bookings responsibly, keep shared content appropriate, and access only with IES Luis Vives accounts. Tokens renew monthly and are not transferable. Service availability may change due to maintenance. IES Luis Vives may update these terms when needed.

settings.faq.title: FAQ
settings.faq.subtitle: Answers to your frequently asked questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1.question: What are tokens and what are they for?
faq.q1.answer: Tokens are the virtual currency of the application that allows students to make reservations. Each space or service has a cost in tokens.
faq.q2.question: How can I make a reservation?
faq.q2.answer: To make a reservation, go to the 'Bookings' section, select the desired space or service, choose the day and time, and click confirm. You will need enough tokens.
faq.q3.question: What happens if I cancel my reservation?
faq.q3.answer: If you cancel your reservation, the tokens used will be returned to you so you can use them in the future.
faq.q4.question: Why am I not getting notifications?
faq.q4.answer: Check that you have notifications enabled both in your device settings and within the app (Settings > Notification preferences).
faq.q5.question: What is the difference between Spaces and Services?
faq.q5.answer: Spaces are physical locations at the school, such as courts or classrooms. Services apply to specific school facilities like laboratories or appointments.
faq.q6.question: How do the notice board announcements work?
faq.q6.answer: The bulletin board contains open announcements published by school administrators. You can opt to receive email copies from your Preferences.
faq.q7.question: Can I place cafe orders from the app?
faq.q7.answer: Currently, the cafe section in the app is purely informational, allowing you to check today's menu and prices. Orders must still be placed in person.
faq.q8.question: If I run out of tokens, how do I get more?
faq.q8.answer: Tokens are automatically reloaded on a monthly basis for all users. If you run out, you must wait until the next month or ask an administrator for an adjustment.
shell.footer.description: Integrated management and booking platform for IES Luis Vives. It optimizes school resources digitally and efficiently, facilitating access to spaces and services.
